full_text:
Chunyu Dao 淳于導
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chunyu Dao (淳于導). Captured Mi Zhu at Changban but was spotted and slain by Zhao Yun. Chunyu Dao is a fictional character. Chunyu Dao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Chunyu Dao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
